steps.title: Get Your Free Quote
steps.description: Call us, fill out our quick online form, or schedule directly. We'll get back to you promptly.

steps.title: Schedule Your Appointment
steps.description: Choose a date and time that works for your household. We offer convenient scheduling options to fit your week.

steps.title: We Arrive & Assess
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on time, assess the job scope, and confirm any special needs.

steps.title: Expert Window Cleaning
steps.description: We use purified water systems and professional tools to deliver a spotless, crystal-clear finish.

steps.title: Quality Inspection & Guarantee
steps.description: We walk through the job with you. 100% happy or we come back — no questions, no charge.
